settings.heading: What products do we sell?
settings.text: Prestige offers premium men's tailoring and everyday essentials — including suits, sport jackets, dress shirts, dress pants, shoes, and accessories.

settings.heading: How many products are in the store?
settings.text: We carry a curated and growing selection across all our menswear categories, with new arrivals added regularly.

settings.heading: What is the delivery time?
settings.text: Delivery times vary by shipping method and location. You'll receive tracking information as soon as your order ships.

settings.heading: Do we have local pickup?
settings.text: Local pickup availability varies — please contact us and we'll let you know if it's available in your area.

settings.heading: Secure Checkout
settings.text: Your payment information is always protected

settings.heading: Newsletter
settings.text: Be the first to know about new collections and exclusive offers
